ffmpeg.wasm test harness

Fast-start MP4 remux, ffmpeg-style

This page takes a local video file and runs the same kind of remux you trust from ffmpeg: -c copy -movflags +faststart. It is meant for testing whether the file becomes seekable in the same way as your batch script.

Input

The page tries both modern module loading and the older createFFmpeg bundle style. Change the folder/filenames above if your local build uses different names.

Output

Idle Not loaded
Load ffmpeg, then pick a file.
